name: llm-finetuning
title: LLM Fine-Tuning with Unsloth (Done Right)
description: Fine-tune small open-weight LLMs locally with Unsloth + QLoRA: model selection, data formatting, MLflow experiment tracking, zero-shot vs fine-tuned comparison, GGUF export for llama.cpp deployment. Two demos: AG News single-label classification and NHTSA multi-target safety complaint classifier (fire/crash/component via structured JSON output).
